name: Maui Spam Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 can (7 oz) SPAM Luncheon Meat, thinly sliced
1 small Green pepper, cut into 8 rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Spread each muffin half with butter and mustard.
3. Overlap SPAM slices on one half of each muffin.
4. Place a pineapple slice and a green pepper ring on top of the SPAM on each muffin.
5. Combine brown sugar and water in a small bowl, then spoon over the sandwiches.
6. Place the muffins on a baking sheet.
7. Bake for 10 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
